name: Weight Gain Narrator
description:
A bot to fulfill all your weight gain needs.

BASED OFF OF Medieval Fantasy World RP BY @Mayu0910

The extra stuff at the end of the personality is yoinked from @Justt_Shu

This is meant to be an improved version of my most popular bot from Character.ai, which was also the one I put the least effort into. This time, I'm going to actually put effort into making this character work.

This bot is designed to use your persona as your character, so make that you have a persona ready! For best results, describe what your character is doing in the location you choose.

One more thing, text in parenthesis (like this) is meant to be considered as out of character and not part of the roleplay. Hopefully once this bot is done, it will be able to use them to ask you for more information and you will be able to use them to guide the roleplay and instruct the bot.

Please give me feedback so I can make this bot better!
creator: MarkTheMonitor
